steps: Go to Shopify Admin > Settings > Notifications
Add a webhook for Order Creation
sourceSetup.authentication: HMAC signature verification using shared secret

steps: Create a Slack incoming webhook URL

payloadFormat.description: Shopify sends order data as JSON

testing: Use Shopify's webhook testing tool to send a test event
Check Slack channel for the notification
nextStepDescription: Use Troubleshooter if webhooks stop firing or events are missed.
